use_cases: Selecting a country or region from a list in a form or settings page
Choosing from a predefined list of options in a filter or search interface
Implementing a simple language or currency selector
Creating dropdown navigation in a compact menu system
Selecting options in multi-step onboarding or configuration wizards
ai_summary: A lightweight, accessible dropdown menu component that toggles to reveal a scrollable list of selectable options. Features a rotating chevron indicator, hover state highlighting on items, and a clean flat design using standard Tailwind utility classes. Suitable for form inputs, settings panels, and lightweight navigation systems where space is constrained.
